title: Oak's Geographic Expansion
description: A modpack that focuses heavily on overhauling Overworld terrain generation, while adding new and quality-of life mods, along with new content, biomes, and more from various different mods! Minecraft 1.20.1 only.
body:
# Oak's Geographic Expansion Modpack

_**This is an extremely heavy and experiemental modpack; things will break, the game will crash. Requires a beefy PC. Please use caution when starting a progressive survival world!**_

A modpack that focuses heavily on overhauling Overworld terrain generation, while adding new and quality-of life mods, along with new content, biomes, and more from various different mods! Minecraft 1.20.1 only.

**Use with included Distant Horizons and Bliss shaders to fully appreciate the spanning terrain generation!!!**

**Enable all resource packs as well for the full experience!**

****
## Terrain Generation
**Most prominently, the terrain generation in this modpack is completely new, and also customizable, featuring mods such as:**

### > Reterraforged
Allows full customization of terrain, making deeper caves, huge, flowing plains, and monstrous mountains possible.

### > Oh the Biomes We've Gone
Adds a multitude of unique, whimsical biomes, breathtaking in their own right.

### > Regions Unexplored
Adds new biomes and blocks to your world, expanding the diverse biome structure to enhance terrain variety. Compatible with Reterraforged and all other mods!

### > Tectonic
(May not even function, but its here.) Enables and assists in moutain generation and flowing, wide spaces.

### > Nullscape
Overhauls End generation!

### > Incendium
Overhauls Nether gnereation (along with Regions Unexplored)!


## Content and Quality of Life Mods

### > Performance Mods
Includes the suite of performance mods, like Sodium, Entity Culling, Lazy DFU, and Starlight.

### > Sound Mods
Includes Ambeint Environment and Ambient Sounds, Charmonium, Presence Footsteps, Sounds, and more!

### > Structure and Content Mods
Adds a multitude of structures, some challenging, some less. Includes Bygone Nether, Deeper and Darker, Dungeons and Taverns, End Remastered, Explorify, MES, When Dungeons Arise, and more!

### > Quality of Life, Tweaks, and More
These include First Person Model, Waystones, AppleSkin, Better Combat, Chipped, Comforts, Fresh Animations, Fabric Seasons, Enhanced Visuals, Inv Move, Immersive Weathering, JEI, Rechiseled, Vanilla Tweaks, Traveler's Backpack, and more!

### > Mob Expansions
Includes Eldrich Mobs, Bosses of Mass Destruction, Ender Dragon Fight Remastered, Friends and Foes, and more!

****

### Disclaimer
_I take no credit for any of the mods, resource packs, etc. used in this modpack. All the work was done by the wonderful developers. I simply just threw what I liked together into one pack. If you are a developer and would like your mod removed from this modpack or have any issue, you can contact me via Discord @OaksTheAwesome._

****

### Attribution
_Vanilla Tweaks - [https://vanillatweaks.net/](https://vanillatweaks.net/)_
